<?php /* * This file is part of Psy Shell. * * (c) 2012-2026 Justin Hileman * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Psy\Exception; /** * A break exception, used for halting the Psy Shell. */ class BreakException extends \Exception implements Exception { private string $rawMessage; /** * {@inheritdoc} */ public function __construct($message = '', $code = 0, ?\Throwable $previous = null) { $this->rawMessage = $message; parent::__construct(\sprintf('Exit: %s', $message), $code, $previous); } /** * Return a raw (unformatted) version of the error message. */ public function getRawMessage(): string { return $this->rawMessage; } /** * Throws BreakException. * * Since `throw` can not be inserted into arbitrary expressions, it wraps with function call. * * @param int|string|null $status Exit status code or message * * @throws BreakException */ public static function exitShell($status = 0) { throw new self(\is_string($status) ? $status : 'Goodbye', \is_int($status) ? $status : 0); } }
